name: Chocolate Cottontails
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until frothy.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients (except chocolate) into the egg whites. Shape the mixture into small eggs using your hands; greased baking pan works best.
3. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
4. Loosen with a spatula immediately after baking and let cool completely.
5. Melt the chocolate in the microwave or over a double boiler. Let it cool slightly.
6. Dip the eggs one at a time into the melted chocolate using a fork, spoon, or toothpick. Reheat the chocolate if it cools too much before finishing.
7. Allow the coating to set, then store the eggs in a cool, dry place (refrigerator).
